title: SpaceX Makes History with Largest Stock Market Launch Ever
subtitle: Investors are betting billions on Elon Musk’s vision, but experts warn of high risks and uncertain profits.

summary.en: SpaceX has launched the largest initial public offering (IPO) in history, raising $75 billion. The company is now valued at nearly $1.8 trillion, despite reporting significant financial losses last year. Many investors are excited by Elon Musk’s ambitious plans for space travel and artificial intelligence. However, financial analysts warn that the company’s current value may be far too high. The move also brings new rules and public scrutiny that the company has not faced before.
summary.zh: SpaceX 已完成歷史上規模最大的首次公開募股，籌集了 750 億美元。儘管去年報告了鉅額財務虧損，該公司市值仍接近 1.8 兆美元。許多投資人對馬斯克在太空旅行與人工智慧方面的宏大計畫感到興奮。然而，金融分析師警告，該公司目前的價值可能過高。此次上市也為公司帶來了以往未曾面臨的新規範與公眾審視。

paragraphs.en: SpaceX, the space and technology company led by Elon Musk, has officially entered the public stock market. On Thursday, the company completed an initial public offering (IPO) — the process where a private company first sells shares to the public — raising $75 billion. This is the largest IPO in history, easily beating the previous record set by Saudi Aramco in 2019. With this launch, SpaceX is now valued at approximately $1.78 trillion, making it one of the largest companies in the United States.
paragraphs.zh: 由伊隆·馬斯克（Elon Musk）領導的太空科技公司 SpaceX，已正式進入公開股票市場。週四，該公司完成了首次公開募股（IPO）——即私人企業首次向大眾出售股份的過程——並籌集了 750 億美元。這是歷史上規模最大的首次公開募股，輕鬆打破了沙烏地阿拉伯國家石油公司（Saudi Aramco）於 2019 年創下的紀錄。隨著此次上市，SpaceX 的市值現已達到約 1.78 兆美元，使其成為美國規模最大的企業之一。

paragraphs.en: For many investors, buying SpaceX stock is a bet on the vision of Elon Musk. According to NPR Business, Musk holds a very strong position in the company, controlling the board and owning more than 80% of the voting power. Supporters point to his success with Tesla as a reason to trust his leadership. However, some experts are concerned. Angelo Bochanis from Renaissance Capital noted that Musk is involved in many different projects, including his work with the government, which might divide his attention. Others, like US Senator Elizabeth Warren, have even asked regulators to delay the IPO due to concerns about how the company is managed and its very high valuation.
paragraphs.zh: 對許多投資人而言，購買 SpaceX 的股票是對馬斯克願景的一場豪賭。根據美國公共廣播電台（NPR）商業頻道的報導，馬斯克在公司內部擁有極高的話語權，不僅掌控董事會，還持有超過 80% 的投票權。支持者認為他在特斯拉（Tesla）取得的成功，是信任其領導能力的理由。然而，部分專家對此感到擔憂。來自文藝復興資本（Renaissance Capital）的安傑洛·波查尼斯（Angelo Bochanis）指出，馬斯克同時參與了許多不同的專案，包括與政府的合作，這可能會分散他的注意力。其他人，如美國參議員伊莉莎白·華倫（Elizabeth Warren），甚至要求監管機構推遲此次上市，理由是擔心該公司的管理方式及其過高的估值。

paragraphs.en: SpaceX is not just a rocket company. It is made up of three main parts: space exploration, satellite internet through Starlink, and artificial intelligence (AI) through its xAI division. The company has very big goals, such as building cities on Mars and placing AI data centers in space. While these ideas are exciting, they are also very expensive and difficult to achieve. According to Deutsche Welle, SpaceX reported a net loss of $4.9 billion in 2025. While Starlink is currently profitable, the rest of the company is still losing money. This makes the $1.78 trillion valuation feel very high to many financial experts.
paragraphs.zh: SpaceX 不僅僅是一家火箭公司，它由三個主要部分組成：太空探索、透過星鏈（Starlink）提供的衛星網路，以及透過其人工智慧部門 xAI 所發展的技術。該公司擁有極其宏大的目標，例如在火星上建立城市，以及將人工智慧資料中心部署在太空中。雖然這些構想令人振奮，但實現起來既昂貴又困難。根據德國之聲（Deutsche Welle）報導，SpaceX 在 2025 年報告了 49 億美元的淨虧損。儘管星鏈目前已實現獲利，但公司其餘業務仍在虧損中。這使得 1.78 兆美元的估值在許多金融專家眼中顯得過高。

paragraphs.en: Financial research group Morningstar has warned that there is a large gap between what investors expect and the company’s actual financial health. Michael Field, a strategist at Morningstar, suggested that the current price is based on speculation rather than facts. While the company claims it has a massive market opportunity, Morningstar estimates that the company is worth significantly less than its current market price. Because of this, some analysts are telling investors to wait and see how the company performs before buying shares.
paragraphs.zh: 金融研究機構晨星（Morningstar）警告稱，投資人的期望與公司實際的財務狀況之間存在巨大落差。晨星的策略師麥可·菲爾德（Michael Field）認為，目前的股價是基於投機而非事實。雖然該公司聲稱擁有龐大的市場機會，但晨星估計其價值遠低於目前的市場價格。因此，部分分析師建議投資人先觀望該公司的表現，再決定是否購買股票。

paragraphs.en: Moving from a private company to a public one will change how SpaceX operates. As a private firm, SpaceX did not have to share its financial details with the world. Now, as a public company, it must file regular reports about its money and business activities. This will give investors a clearer look at the company’s profits and debts. Songyee Yoon of Principal Venture Partners described this as a "sobering moment." She explained that while private investors often buy into the "promise" of new technology, the public market cares much more about actual profits and practical business models.
paragraphs.zh: 從私人企業轉型為上市公司將改變 SpaceX 的運作方式。身為私人企業時，SpaceX 無需向外界公開其財務細節。如今成為上市公司，它必須定期提交關於資金與業務活動的報告。這將讓投資人更清楚地檢視該公司的獲利與債務狀況。Principal Venture Partners 的尹松伊（Songyee Yoon）將此描述為一個「令人清醒的時刻」。她解釋說，雖然私人投資人通常會買單新科技的「願景」，但公開市場更在乎的是實際獲利與務實的商業模式。

paragraphs.en: Despite these concerns, the demand for SpaceX shares has been huge. Reports indicate that the IPO was oversubscribed, meaning investors wanted to buy three or four times more shares than were actually available. A large portion of these shares, up to 30%, has been set aside for individual retail investors rather than just big banks or large funds. This shows that the public is very eager to own a piece of the company, regardless of the risks.
paragraphs.zh: 儘管存在這些擔憂，市場對 SpaceX 股票的需求依然龐大。報告顯示，此次首次公開募股出現超額認購，意味著投資人想要購買的股份數量是實際發行量的三到四倍。這些股份中，高達 30% 的比例被保留給個人散戶投資人，而非僅限於大型銀行或基金。這顯示出大眾渴望持有該公司股份，而不論其背後的風險。

paragraphs.en: What happens next for SpaceX remains uncertain. The company plans to use the money from the IPO to fund its expensive projects, including missions to Mars and new space-based technology. Whether these investments will pay off is the big question for the market. For now, SpaceX is in the spotlight, and the world is watching to see if Musk can turn his futuristic goals into a profitable business. As the company joins major stock market indexes, it will likely attract even more interest from funds that track these markets, potentially keeping the stock price volatile for some time to come.
paragraphs.zh: SpaceX 的下一步發展仍充滿不確定性。該公司計畫利用首次公開募股籌得的資金，來資助其昂貴的專案，包括火星任務與新型太空技術。這些投資是否能獲得回報，是市場面臨的最大問題。目前，SpaceX 正處於聚光燈下，全世界都在觀察馬斯克能否將其前瞻性的目標轉化為獲利的商業模式。隨著該公司加入主要的股票市場指數，預計將吸引更多追蹤這些市場的基金關注，這可能會使股價在未來一段時間內持續波動。

keyTerms.definitionEn: A choice or action based on the belief that something will happen or be successful.
keyTerms.definitionZh: 賭注；在此指對某事物的信心或預測。
keyTerms.noteZh: 常見作動詞（打賭），這裡作名詞，指投資人對公司未來的信心。文中：For many investors, buying SpaceX stock is a bet on the vision of Elon Musk.

keyTerms.definitionEn: When the demand for shares is greater than the number of shares available.
keyTerms.definitionZh: 超額認購的；指需求量大於供給量。
keyTerms.noteZh: 這是金融領域的專用詞，容易被誤解為「訂閱過多」。文中：Reports indicate that the IPO was oversubscribed, meaning investors wanted to buy three or four times more shares than were actually available.

keyTerms.definitionEn: To result in success or a good outcome.
keyTerms.noteZh: 常見作「還清債務」，這裡指投資計畫獲得預期的回報。文中：Whether these investments will pay off is the big question for the market.

keyTerms.definitionEn: A position of public attention or interest.
keyTerms.noteZh: 原意為舞台上的「聚光燈」，這裡引申為備受關注的狀態。文中：For now, SpaceX is in the spotlight, and the world is watching to see if Musk can turn his futuristic goals into a profitable business.

sources.name: NPR Business
sources.title: SpaceX blasts off with a record-breaking $75 billion IPO

sources.name: The Guardian Business
sources.title: SpaceX heads for record $1.78tn float amid fears it is overvalued

sources.name: Deutsche Welle (DW) Top
sources.title: Musk's SpaceX IPO holds both promise and peril

quiz.question: What is the specific reason mentioned for why some experts are skeptical about SpaceX's current leadership?

options.A: Elon Musk owns less than half of the company's voting power.
options.B: Musk's involvement in multiple projects may split his focus.
options.C: The company has failed to launch any successful rockets recently.
options.D: Regulators have already officially blocked the IPO process.

quiz.explanationZh: 正確答案為 B。根據文章第二段，專家 Angelo Bochanis 指出 Musk 同時參與多項計畫，這可能會分散他對 SpaceX 的注意力。選項 A 錯誤，因為文章提到他擁有超過 80% 的投票權；選項 C 文中未提及；選項 D 錯誤，因為 IPO 已經正式完成，並非被封鎖。

quiz.question: Based on the text, why might individual retail investors face higher risks than they realize when buying SpaceX stock?

options.A: Because the company is no longer allowed to work with the government.
options.B: Because the stock price is guaranteed to drop once the IPO ends.
options.C: Because the current valuation relies more on future promises than on existing financial profits.
options.D: Because the company is required to keep its financial details secret from the public.

quiz.explanationZh: 正確答案為 C。根據第三段與第四段，儘管 SpaceX 市值高達 1.78 兆美元，但公司仍處於虧損狀態，且金融專家指出當前價格多基於推測而非實際獲利。選項 A 文中未提及；選項 B 過於武斷，文中僅提到價格波動；選項 D 錯誤，轉為上市公司後必須公開財務細節。

quiz.question: In the fifth paragraph, what does Songyee Yoon mean when she describes the transition to a public company as a 'sobering moment'?

options.A: It is a time when the company must face the harsh reality of needing to show actual profits.
options.B: It is a moment of celebration for the company's successful past achievements.
options.C: It is a period where the company will become less serious about its goals.
options.D: It is a time when investors are finally allowed to ignore the company's debts.

quiz.explanationZh: 正確答案為 A。文中提到「sobering」在此處意指從夢想回到現實，因為公開市場比私人投資者更看重實際獲利能力（actual profits）而非僅是願景。選項 B 與文中語境相反；選項 C 錯誤，公開上市反而增加壓力；選項 D 內容與事實完全相反。

quiz.question: What is the primary message of the article regarding SpaceX's IPO?

options.A: SpaceX has officially become the most profitable company in human history.
options.B: Elon Musk is stepping down from his position to focus on AI research.
options.C: The IPO shows high public interest, but experts warn that the company's high valuation is risky due to financial concerns.
options.D: The US government has forced SpaceX to go public to ensure better management.

quiz.explanationZh: 正確答案為 C。全文核心在於報導 SpaceX 上市的盛況，同時平衡地呈現了市場的熱情與金融專家對其高估值背後財務隱憂的警告。選項 A 誇大其詞；選項 B 文中未提及 Musk 要離職；選項 D 錯誤，文中未提到政府強制要求上市。
